# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: your-storage-account-name
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    location: your-location
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    accessTier: Hot
    kind: StorageV2

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/blobContainers
    name: application-logs
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    dependsOn:
      - your-storage-account-name
    properties:
      accountName: your-storage-account-name
      containerAcl:
        accessPolicy:
          - permissions: r
            tenants: [your-tenant-id]
          - permissions: r
            users: [your-user-id]

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/blobContainers
    name: application-backups
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    dependsOn:
      - your-storage-account-name
    properties:
      accountName: your-storage-account-name
      containerAcl:
        accessPolicy:
          - permissions: r
            tenants: [your-tenant-id]
          - permissions: r
            users: [your-user-id]
